div.p: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

tr.td:
Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1: Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: The vaccine can be given from > 1 year of age.
If:
Applicability:
Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1
(Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

TBE Encepur dose 2: Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 2 Trigger event: First TBE dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 Trigger date: "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Create condition: An interval of 1–3 months is recommended between the first 2 doses.
If:
Applicability:
TBE Encepur dose 2
(TBE Encepur dose 2)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (TBE Encepur dose 2 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

TBE Encepur dose 3: Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 3 Trigger event: Second TBE dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Create condition: For Encepur, the requirement is 9–12 months between doses 2 and 3.
If:
Applicability:
TBE Encepur dose 3
(TBE Encepur dose 3)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (TBE Encepur dose 3 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

TBE Encepur booster dose: Provision of the TBE Encepur booster dose Trigger event: The primary series has been completed Trigger pseudo: "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Trigger date: "Date when primary vaccination series was completed" Create condition: The manufacturer recommends a booster dose to be administered 3 years after completion of the primary series.
If:
Applicability:
TBE Encepur booster dose
(TBE Encepur booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (TBE Encepur booster dose Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

valueString.value: Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": [Immunization] I where I.status = 'completed' and I.isSubpotent is not true
Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
TBE Doses Administered to Patient
/* @internal: TBE containing Doses Administered to Patient */ define "TBE Doses Administered to Patient": Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.vaccineCode in Concepts."TBE vaccines"
TBE Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of TBE Primary Series Doses Administered
Two TBE primary series doses were administered
Second TBE dose from the primary series was administered
Three TBE primary series doses were administered
Third TBE dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
TBE Encepur dose 3
One TBE primary series dose was administered
First TBE dose from the primary series was administered
TBE Encepur dose 2
No TBE primary series doses were administered
Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1
Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1 Due Date
Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) Encepur dose 1 Create
TBE Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of TBE Booster Series Doses Administered
At least one booster dose was administered
TBE booster dose was administered
TBE Encepur booster dose
Date of Latest TBE Dose
TBE Encepur dose 3 Due Date
TBE Encepur dose 3 Overdue
TBE Encepur dose 3 Create
TBE Encepur dose 2 Due Date
TBE Encepur dose 2 Overdue
TBE Encepur dose 2 Create
TBE Encepur booster dose Due Date
TBE Encepur booster dose Overdue
TBE Encepur booster dose Create

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series */ define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
define function ToString(value string): value.value
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define function ToDate(value date): value.value

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series */ define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )
define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>): Last( immunizations I sort by start of occurrence.toInterval() )

citation.value: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

description.value: Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: The vaccine can be given from > 1 year of age.

Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 2 Trigger event: First TBE dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 Trigger date: "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Create condition: An interval of 1–3 months is recommended between the first 2 doses.

Provision of the TBE Encepur dose 3 Trigger event: Second TBE dose from the primary series was administered Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 2 Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Create condition: For Encepur, the requirement is 9–12 months between doses 2 and 3.

Provision of the TBE Encepur booster dose Trigger event: The primary series has been completed Trigger pseudo: "Completed the primary vaccination series" = TRUE (where "Vaccine type" = "TBE vaccines") Trigger date: "Date when primary vaccination series was completed" Create condition: The manufacturer recommends a booster dose to be administered 3 years after completion of the primary series.
